title: Oreogrammitis medialis
taxonomy: Oreogrammitis medialis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, which is a family of vascular plants that are commonly known as polypody ferns. It belongs to the genus Oreogrammitis, a group of ferns that are native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Within the family Polypodiaceae, Oreogrammitis medialis is classified as a member of the subfamily Polypodioideae. This subfamily contains a large number of species, many of which are found in the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. Oreogrammitis medialis is further classified into the order Polypodiales, which includes all the vascular plants that are commonly known as polypody ferns.
